app.title: OOpii Infinite Canvas
app.subtitle: Infinite Canvas
app.bootDescription: Loading project summaries, canvas state, and local settings so the app frame appears immediately instead of waiting on a blank screen.

common.referencePickerHint: Use Up/Down to choose, Enter or Tab to insert

titleBar.jimengChromeMissing: Chrome or Chromium was not found. Please install Google Chrome first.

extensions.title: Extensions Center
extensions.centerDescription: Load extension packages from folders and start them when needed. If you stop one or close the app, start it again before using it.
extensions.bridgeHint: Note: `hunyuanworld-panorama-hq` is currently a bridge package. It does not include the HunyuanWorld source tree or model weights, so the small folder size is expected.
extensions.sampleHint: You can now load extension-packages/qwen3-tts-complete directly. If you need to rebuild the full package, run npm run prepare:qwen3-tts-extension.
extensions.emptyDescription: Choose a folder that contains storyboard-extension.json to load an extension package.
extensions.openFolderFailed: Failed to open the extension folder
extensions.readyHint: Once started, the related nodes appear in the canvas node menu and reuse the active runtime.
extensions.idleHint: The extension package is loaded, but the backend is not running yet. The persistent Python runtime starts only after you click Start.
extensions.noModels: This extension package does not declare model assets.
extensions.deleteConfirm: Remove "{{name}}" from Extensions Center? This will not delete the extension folder from disk.

nodeToolbar.noDownloadPresetPathsHint: No preset path. Add one in Settings > General.

modelParams.thinkingLevelDesc: Only applies to fal Nano Banana 2. High thinking adds extra cost.

jimeng.firstLastFrameRequiresTwoImages: First / last frame mode requires exactly 2 reference images.

jimeng.queueEnqueueFailed: Failed to add the Jimeng video task to the queue
jimeng.queueResultNodeMissing: Failed to create the Jimeng video result node
jimeng.referenceVideoTooLong: Video references must be shorter than {{seconds}} seconds. Please trim the clip before connecting it.
jimeng.referenceVideoTooMany: You can connect at most {{count}} video references right now.
jimeng.durationSuggestionIdle: Suggested duration will appear after prompt optimization
jimeng.durationSuggestionLoading: LLM is estimating a suitable duration...
jimeng.durationSuggestionOverflow: Suggested duration: {{seconds}}s. This content may need about {{estimated}}s and could exceed the 15s limit.
jimeng.submitHint: Automatic send now fills only the prompt and images, then triggers Jimeng send directly. Please confirm ratio, duration, and other parameters on the Jimeng page itself.
jimeng.manualSetupReminderTitle: Confirm Jimeng parameters on the web page first
jimeng.manualSetupReminderBody: This node now only fills the prompt and reference images automatically. It no longer chooses mode, ratio, duration, model, or other Jimeng parameters for you.
jimeng.manualSetupReminderFootnote: After closing this reminder, please set the mode, reference method, model, ratio, duration, and any other options on the Jimeng page first, then come back and click send.
jimeng.toolbarSyncFailed: Failed to sync Jimeng toolbar options
jimeng.toolbarSyncFailedWithReason: Failed to sync Jimeng toolbar options: {{reason}}
jimeng.resultReturnedAt: Generated to the video result node at {{time}}
jimeng.resultEmpty: Jimeng did not return any usable video result

modelDescriptions.seedance-2.0-fast: Faster and lighter for quick iteration.
modelDescriptions.seedance-2.0: Balanced quality and consistency for mainline video tasks.
modelDescriptions.seedance-1.5-pro: Higher quality classic route for stable output.
modelDescriptions.seedance-1.0-fast: Faster legacy mode for quicker drafts.
modelDescriptions.seedance-1.0-mini: Lightweight legacy mode for simple attempts.

referenceModeDescriptions.allAround: General-purpose reference mode close to the current default.
referenceModeDescriptions.firstLastFrame: Best when you want to anchor the opening and ending frames.
referenceModeDescriptions.smartFrames: Use multiple connected images as a temporal reference hint.
referenceModeDescriptions.subject: Prioritize subject identity and object continuity.

jimeng.audioReferencesEmpty: Connect audio nodes and they will be submitted as reference audio.
jimeng.cliBlockedAudioNeedsImage: Audio references currently require at least one image or video reference before Dreamina CLI can submit the task.

cliHint.frames2video: CLI: {{command}} | Uses only the first and last image | Effective model {{model}} | Duration {{duration}} | Resolution {{resolution}}
cliHint.multiframeTwo: CLI: {{command}} | 2 reference images | Duration 2-8s | Model / ratio / resolution are fixed by the CLI
cliHint.multiframeMany: CLI: {{command}} | {{count}} reference images | Transition durations are auto-distributed | Model / ratio / resolution are fixed by the CLI
cliHint.multimodal2video: CLI: {{command}} | Effective model {{model}} | Duration 4-15s | Resolution 720p | Input limits: image<=9 / video<=3 / audio<=3

jimeng.parameterHint: This node now uses fixed Dreamina CLI parameters and creates a video result node after generation.

modelOptionDescriptions.seedance20: Balanced default for quality and stability.
modelOptionDescriptions.seedance20fastVip: VIP accelerated lane for faster high-frequency generation.
modelOptionDescriptions.seedance20Vip: VIP accelerated lane with a stronger quality and speed balance.
modelOptionDescriptions.v3_5pro: Higher quality route for richer detail.

seedance.promptPlaceholder: Describe the scene, motion, framing, and timing for Seedance 2.0 video generation
seedance.promptRequired: Please enter a prompt for Seedance video generation
seedance.apiKeyRequired: Please set the Volcengine API key in Settings
seedance.noReferences: Connect upstream images, videos, or audio to build Seedance inputs.

modeHints.textToVideo: Text to video uses the prompt only. Disconnect any references before submitting.
modeHints.firstFrame: First frame mode requires exactly 1 connected image reference.
modeHints.firstLastFrame: First / last frame mode requires exactly 2 connected image references.
modeHints.reference: Reference mode accepts images, videos, and optional audio. At least one visual reference is required.

seedance.textToVideoNoReferences: Text to video mode does not accept reference images, videos, or audio.
seedance.firstFrameRequiresOneImage: First frame mode requires exactly 1 image reference.
seedance.firstFrameOnlySupportsImages: First frame mode supports image references only.
seedance.firstLastFrameRequiresTwoImages: First / last frame mode requires exactly 2 image references.
seedance.firstLastFrameOnlySupportsImages: First / last frame mode supports image references only.
seedance.referenceRequiresVisual: Reference mode requires at least 1 image or video reference.
seedance.referenceImageLimit: Reference mode supports at most {{count}} images.
seedance.referenceVideoLimit: Reference mode supports at most {{count}} videos.
seedance.referenceAudioLimit: Reference mode supports at most {{count}} audio clips.
seedance.referenceVideoDurationLimit: The combined video reference duration must stay within {{seconds}} seconds.
seedance.referenceAudioDurationLimit: The combined audio reference duration must stay within {{seconds}} seconds.
seedance.referenceAudioNeedsVisual: Audio references cannot be submitted alone. Add at least 1 image or video reference.

modelOptionDescriptions.seedance20: Standard quality profile for steadier output.

qwenTts.connectedTextHint: Reads content from connected audio text, script text, or script nodes automatically
qwenTts.runtimeStateReady: The local model is ready and can generate speech offline.
qwenTts.runtimeStateStarting: The extension is starting. Voice generation will be available once the local runtime checks finish.
qwenTts.runtimeStateDisabled: The extension package is loaded, but the local runtime is not started yet. Start the extension before generating speech.
qwenTts.recipeDescription: Describe age, emotion, tone, and intimacy in natural language. The model will turn that description into a voice style.
qwenTts.voicePromptRequired: Enter a voice design prompt first
qwenTts.voicePromptPlaceholder: Example: young female voice, restrained emotion, intimate close-mic narration
qwenTts.optimizePromptFailed: Failed to optimize the voice design prompt
qwenTts.styleHint: Choose a base tone first, then refine it with your voice prompt
qwenTts.rhythmDescription: Control language, speaking speed, and pitch contour to shape the performance more precisely.
qwenTts.pauseDescription: Mirror the ComfyUI-style pause settings so line breaks and punctuation can each carry their own silence timing.
qwenTts.advancedSettingsHint: Fine-tune randomness, stability, and output length after previewing your first result.
qwenTts.advancedSummary: Temp {{temperature}} · Top P {{topP}} · Top K {{topK}} · Penalty {{repetitionPenalty}} · {{maxNewTokens}} tokens
qwenTts.noInputText: Connect an audio text, script text, or script node first
qwenTts.waitingForText: Waiting for upstream audio or script content
qwenTts.extensionDisabled: Enable the Qwen TTS extension first in Extensions Center
qwenTts.extensionStarting: The extension runtime is still starting. Please wait a moment.

styleDescriptions.natural: Everyday delivery that works well as a general baseline
styleDescriptions.narrator: More like narration, with steadier articulation
styleDescriptions.bright: Lighter and brighter, good for younger energy
styleDescriptions.calm: Restrained and steady, with less dramatic swing

parameterDescriptions.maxNewTokens: Controls the maximum generation length for one request. Raise it for longer text.
parameterDescriptions.temperature: Higher feels freer, lower feels more stable.
parameterDescriptions.topP: Controls how wide the candidate pool is. Lower values are more conservative.
parameterDescriptions.topK: Limits how many candidates can be sampled each step. Lower values are safer.
parameterDescriptions.repetitionPenalty: Higher values reduce repetition, but too much can make delivery sound stiff.

qwenTts.outputFormatHint: This extension can export both WAV and MP3 directly. WAV is better for editing, MP3 saves space.

pauseDescriptions.question: Silence inserted after question marks.
pauseDescriptions.hyphen: Silence inserted after hyphens or em dashes.

savedVoice.referenceDescription: Connect a reference audio node, enter its transcript, then save the extracted voice features as a reusable bundle.
savedVoice.selectPresetHint: Choose a saved preset from the dropdown
savedVoice.presetOverridesManualHint: Selecting a preset disconnects the manual reference-audio link and switches to the preset audio plus its saved transcript.
savedVoice.noPresetAssets: No reusable voice presets yet. Generate audio in Voice Design first, then save it as a preset from the audio node.
savedVoice.referenceAudioHint: Connect an audio node to the left side of this node as the speaker sample.
savedVoice.referenceTranscriptPlaceholder: Enter the exact words spoken in the reference clip for more stable cloning.
savedVoice.bundleStorageHint: Once saved, the bundle is written into the extension runtime/voices folder for reuse later.
savedVoice.generationTextHint: This node still reads connected text nodes and renders them with the saved voice.
savedVoice.languageDescription: Set language and sampling for generation while continuing to reuse the saved voice bundle.
savedVoice.bundlePendingHint: The node will extract and cache the voice bundle on first use for faster reuse later.
savedVoice.noReferenceAudio: Connect a reference audio node first

voxCpm.runtimeReady: The local VoxCPM2 runtime is ready.
voxCpm.runtimeDisabled: Enable the VoxCPM2 extension in Extensions Center first.
voxCpm.extensionDisabled: Enable the VoxCPM2 extension first in Extensions Center
voxCpm.extensionStarting: The VoxCPM2 extension runtime is still starting. Please wait a moment.
voxCpm.waitingForText: Waiting for upstream audio or script content
voxCpm.noInputText: Connect an audio text, script text, or script node first
voxCpm.voicePromptPlaceholder: Example: calm mature female narrator with soft warmth and clear enunciation
voxCpm.voicePromptHint: This maps to VoxCPM voice-design control text.
voxCpm.controlTextPlaceholder: Example: slightly brighter, more energetic, but still natural
voxCpm.controlTextHint: Optional style instruction layered on top of the cloned voice.
voxCpm.optimizeVoicePromptFailed: Failed to optimize the voice description
voxCpm.optimizeControlTextFailed: Failed to optimize the control instruction
voxCpm.presetHint: Selecting a preset reuses its saved reference audio first. Manual assets and connected audio remain available as fallback.
voxCpm.referenceAudioHint: Choose an audio asset or connect an audio node on the left side.
voxCpm.ultimateReferenceHint: Ultimate Clone uses the selected clip as prompt audio and can also reuse it as the optional reference anchor.
voxCpm.presetDescriptionEmpty: This preset has no saved note yet.
voxCpm.presetTranscriptEmpty: This preset has no saved transcript yet.
voxCpm.presetPreviewHint: Preview the reference audio saved inside this preset.
voxCpm.promptTextPlaceholder: Enter the exact words spoken in the reference clip.
voxCpm.promptTextHint: Ultimate Clone requires the transcript for the prompt audio.
voxCpm.useReferenceAsReference: Also reuse this clip as the optional reference anchor
voxCpm.cfgValueHint: Official VoxCPM examples use around 1.3. Higher values follow control more strongly.
voxCpm.inferenceTimestepsHint: Official VoxCPM examples use around 10 steps. Higher values are slower but can be more stable.

videoNode.uploadHint: Drag or click to upload video

audioNode.supportedFormats: Supported: MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, AAC, FLAC, WebM
audioNode.savePresetHint: This stores the audio together with its reference transcript into the asset library, so the Voice Clone node can reuse it directly later.
audioNode.savePresetDescriptionPlaceholder: For example: soft narration, gentle pacing, youthful tone
audioNode.savePresetMissingAudio: This audio is not ready yet, so it cannot be saved as a preset.
audioNode.savePresetMissingReferenceText: Missing reference transcript. This audio cannot be saved as a preset yet.
audioNode.savePresetNoLibrary: No asset library available yet. Create one in Asset Manager first.
audioNode.savePresetFailed: Failed to save the preset. Please try again.

styleTemplate.emptyTemplateHint: There are no templates in this category yet. Create one from the top right.

styleTemplate.recentEmpty: No style templates have been used recently.

project.emptyHint: Click the button above to create a new project

assets.title: Asset Library
assets.subtitle: Manage linked character, scene, prop, and voice assets by episode.
assets.libraryNameHint: Use one asset library per episode so storyboard projects can bind to it directly.
assets.emptyHint: Create an episode asset library first, then add character, scene, prop, and voice assets for storyboard reuse.
assets.deleteLibraryConfirm: Delete asset library "{{name}}"? Bound storyboard projects will be unlinked, while existing canvas nodes keep their last synced image snapshot and stop following asset updates.
assets.emptySubcategories: No subcategory yet. Add one to organize this section.
assets.emptyAssets: No assets in this section yet.
assets.subcategoryNameHint: Secondary categories help users filter quickly inside the bottom canvas dock.
assets.subcategoryNamePlaceholder: For example: Lead, Villain, Hospital, Bedroom
assets.deleteSubcategoryConfirm: Delete this subcategory? Existing assets will become unassigned.
assets.descriptionPlaceholder: Write a short note for look, role, or usage.
assets.deleteAssetConfirm: Delete this asset? Existing canvas nodes will keep their last synced image snapshot, but they will no longer follow this asset afterward.
assets.searchPlaceholder: Search asset name, description, or tags
assets.emptyFilterResult: No assets match the current filters.
assets.detachedSubtitle: In detached mode you can browse faster and double-click to insert an asset at the center of the current canvas viewport.
assets.doubleClickToInsert: Double-click any asset to insert it at the center of the current canvas viewport
assets.noStoryboardProject: Open a storyboard project in the main window first
assets.noStoryboardProjectHint: The detached asset panel follows the active storyboard project's asset library for quick browsing and placement.
assets.selectLibraryToBrowse: Choose an asset library for this project first
assets.selectLibraryToBrowseHint: Once selected, you can browse and insert assets quickly from this detached panel.
assets.dropImagesToCategory: Drop images here to add them to {{category}}
assets.dropAudioToCategory: Drop audio files here to add them to {{category}}
assets.dropImportAutoFill: Files are added with their file names, and you can edit each one later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pricingDesc: Manage node price display, exchange rate conversion, and credit-pack estimates.
settings.providerGuideText: Different providers vary in model capability, queue speed, stability, and pricing. Switch providers based on your task, and follow each provider's recommended parameters.
settings.dreaminaSectionDesc: Check the Dreamina CLI status, version, and updates here, reopen the login flow, or sign out this machine.
settings.dreaminaUpdateAvailableNotice: A new Dreamina CLI version is available: v{{version}}
settings.dreaminaUpToDateNotice: Dreamina CLI is already up to date.
settings.dreaminaAutoUpdateOnLaunch: Auto update Dreamina CLI on launch
settings.dreaminaAutoUpdateOnLaunchDesc: Check for Dreamina CLI updates whenever the app starts, then download and prefer the updated user-managed CLI automatically.
settings.nanoBananaProModelDesc: Switch the Nano Banana Pro endpoint for this provider. If one endpoint fails, try another one. See the <modelListLink>model list</modelListLink> for details.
settings.scriptModelSelectionDesc: Choose the active model for this script provider. You can also add your own model IDs below.
settings.scriptCustomModelEmpty: No custom models added for this provider yet.
settings.scriptCompatibleDesc: Use a custom OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint for script generation. Models are still managed in the model list above.
settings.scriptCompatibleHint: After filling in the endpoint URL and adding at least one model above, you can test and enable this custom script provider.
settings.storyboardModelSelectionDesc: Manage the available models for this storyboard provider here. When you actually use them, choose the model directly on the canvas node.
settings.storyboardCompatibleModelSelectionDesc: Manage one or more models for this compatible endpoint here. When you actually use them, choose the model directly on the canvas node.
settings.storyboardCustomModelEmpty: No custom storyboard models added for this provider yet.
settings.storyboardCustomModelDisplayNamePlacehol: Display name, for example Banana Pro
settings.storyboardCompatibleDesc: Configure the request format and endpoint URL for this compatible image provider. Then manage one or more models in the model list above.
settings.storyboardCompatibleHint: Save after setting the request format, endpoint URL, and compatible model list. Compatible models without a valid endpoint will not appear in the AI image node or storyboard node model lists.
settings.storyboardCompatibleNoConnectionTest: This experimental compatible entry does not reuse the current text connection test. Save it first, then verify the generation flow directly from a storyboard node.
settings.storyboardNewApiDesc: Configure only the endpoint URL and request format here. Add and switch specific models in the model selection section above.
settings.storyboardNewApiHintOpenaiChat: Send requests through the OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint with Bearer auth, plus the extra_body config required by Gemini.
settings.storyboardNewApiHintOpenaiEdits: Send multipart/form-data to /v1/images/edits and upload reference images as files directly.
settings.storyboardNewApiHintGemini: Send requests through the native Gemini generateContent endpoint, convert references to inlineData, and use Bearer auth.
settings.storyboardNewApiNoConnectionTest: The NewAPI image endpoint does not reuse the current text connection test. Save it first, then verify the generation flow directly from a storyboard node.
settings.radiusPresetDesc: Control global corner style for panels, inputs, and nodes.
settings.themeToneDesc: Choose neutral, warm, or cool tint for both light and dark themes.
settings.edgeRoutingModeDesc: Switch edge path style between nodes, including orthogonal routing with automatic node avoidance.
settings.accentColorDesc: Used by buttons, selected borders, and interaction highlights.
settings.downloadPresetPathsDesc: Used by node toolbar download menu for quick-save directories (up to 8).
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistent: Keep storyboard style aligned with references
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistentDesc: When enabled, storyboard generation prompt appends "图片风格与参考图保持一致".
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImage: Disallow descriptive text in storyboard image
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImageDesc: When enabled, storyboard generation prompt appends "禁止添加描述文本".
settings.ignoreAtTagWhenCopyingAndGeneratingDesc: When enabled, copied text and embedded storyboard metadata remove tags like "@图1"; generation requests only remove "@" and keep "图1".
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitle: Use uploaded filename as node title
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitleDesc: When enabled, newly uploaded images use the file name as the node title by default (still editable via double-click).
settings.groupNodesShortcutDesc: Customize the shortcut used to group selected nodes on the canvas.
settings.shortcutPressNew: Press a key combination now. Press Esc to cancel.
settings.downloadPathPlaceholder: Input folder path, e.g. /Users/name/Pictures/Storyboard or D:\\Images\\Storyboard
settings.getApiKeyLink: click here to get API key
settings.scriptApiDesc: Select the API provider for script generation
settings.storyboardApiDesc: Select the API provider for storyboard generation
settings.missingAnyApiKeyMessage: You have not configured any API keys yet. Please open Settings to configure one.
settings.aboutIntro: An AI storyboard workstation based on a node canvas for generation, editing, and storyboard workflows.
settings.autoCheckUpdateOnLaunchDesc: Check for updates once every time the app starts.
settings.enableUpdateDialogDesc: Show a custom dialog when a new version is detected.
settings.enableStoryboardGenGridPreviewShortcutDe: When enabled, holding Ctrl + Alt + Shift and clicking Generate on storyboard generation creates a grid preview node without sending AI request.
settings.showStoryboardGenAdvancedRatioControlsDe: When enabled, show cell/overall ratio info and the Overall/Cell mode switch. When disabled, storyboard generation uses cell-ratio mode by default.
settings.storyboardGenAutoInferEmptyFrameDesc: When enabled, empty storyboard cells automatically append "依据之前的内容进行推测" during generation prompt construction.
settings.showNodePrice: Show node price in the header
settings.showNodePriceDesc: Continuously estimate the current run cost from the selected model, resolution, and extra options.
settings.priceDisplayCurrencyModeDesc: In auto mode, Chinese uses CNY and English uses USD.
settings.usdToCnyRateDesc: Used only for price display conversion between USD and CNY. It does not change actual provider billing.
settings.preferDiscountedPriceDesc: Currently this only applies to KIE. The discounted domestic pricing usually needs to be requested from KIE separately; when enabled, estimates prefer that discounted rate.
settings.grsaiCreditTierDesc: GRSAI bills in credits, so the per-run estimate changes with your top-up pack.
settings.checkUpdateUpToDate: You are on the latest version.
settings.checkUpdateFailed: Update check failed. Please try again later.
settings.projectStoragePathDesc: Change the storage location for project and asset database records, image files, and database backups. Existing project records, asset records, image files, and backups will be migrated automatically.
settings.sharedDatabase: Projects and assets share one database
settings.storageSharedHint: Asset management does not use a separate database. It currently shares the same projects.db file with projects and migrates together with this storage path.
settings.databaseBackupDesc: Automatic backup saves only projects.db and skips image files, so storage growth stays small while project and asset records remain recoverable.
settings.backupsRetention: Auto backup: once per day, keep 7 copies
settings.restoreBackupConfirmDesc: Restore the database snapshot from {{time}}. Current project and asset records will be replaced, and the app will reload immediately after restore.
settings.restoreBackupSafetyNote: A safety backup of the current database will be created automatically before restore, and image files are not changed by this action.
settings.psIntegrationEnabledDesc: Allow image data exchange with Photoshop plugin
settings.psServerPortDesc: Port number for PS integration server (1024-65535)
settings.psAutoStartServerDesc: Automatically start PS integration server when app launches
settings.psPluginPortDesc: Use port {{port}} in the Photoshop plugin panel
settings.psPortAutoAdjusted: Preferred port {{requested}} was occupied, so the app switched to {{actual}} automatically
settings.aboutPsPortDesc: Shows the actual port currently used by the app so you can keep the plugin panel in sync.
settings.releaseNotesDesc: Review what changed in each version. Starting from 0.1.16, new releases will be tracked here.

added.batchImageExport: Selected images on the canvas can now be exported in batches into a timestamped folder, both inside and outside groups.

optimized.imageEditDefaults: AI image nodes now remember the last selected provider and size when creating new nodes.
optimized.generatedNodeSpacing: Generated AI image result nodes now stack more compactly to reduce empty canvas space.
optimized.groupOverlayExport: Multi-selection overlays inside groups now position correctly, keeping batch export consistent with selections outside groups.

fixed.parallelImageBranches: Fixed the issue where consecutive AI image nodes dragged from the same image were chained instead of created as parallel branches.
fixed.manualImageRefresh: Fixed interrupted AI image result retrieval after long waits or app restarts, and added a manual refresh action.
fixed.videoPersistence: Fixed the issue where video nodes could not be reopened after restarting the app.

added.groupShortcut: Added customizable group shortcut settings in Settings.
added.groupSidebar: Added a groups sidebar for quickly locating groups on the canvas.
added.releaseNotes: Added a release notes section in Settings to keep tracking version changes.

optimized.generatedNodeLayout: AI image generation nodes and split result nodes now align into cleaner columns.
optimized.groupAutoArrange: Groups can now be manually auto-arranged from left to right based on flow direction.
optimized.dragIntoGroup: Nodes can now be dragged directly into a group area and become part of that group.
optimized.spacePanWhileConnecting: While dragging a connection, holding Space now pans the canvas so you can reach distant nodes.

fixed.groupSidebarReopen: Fixed the issue where the groups sidebar could not be reopened after collapsing.
fixed.groupAltDuplicate: Fixed Alt-drag duplication for nodes inside groups.

dreaminaSetup.title: Dreamina First-Use Setup
dreaminaSetup.subtitle: This flow now prepares the bundled Git runtime, checks the bundled CLI, and shows the official login QR code in place when this computer needs authorization. You only need to scan once.

context.default: Finish the local Dreamina setup once before using Jimeng on this computer.
context.imageGenerate: Finish the local Dreamina setup once before generating Jimeng images on this computer.
context.videoGenerate: Finish the local Dreamina setup once before generating Jimeng videos on this computer.
context.imageRequery: Before re-querying Jimeng image results, confirm that Dreamina is ready on this computer.
context.videoRequery: Before re-querying Jimeng video results, confirm that Dreamina is ready on this computer.

status.checkingBody: Checking the Git runtime, Dreamina CLI, and login state on this computer.
status.readyBody: Dreamina CLI is available, so you can continue submitting Jimeng tasks or re-querying results.
status.gitBashMissingTitle: A Git Bash runtime is still missing
status.gitBashMissingBody: The app could not find a bundled portable Git runtime or an existing system Git Bash, so automatic setup cannot continue yet.
status.cliMissingTitle: The bundled Dreamina CLI is missing
status.cliMissingBody: This install could not find the bundled Dreamina CLI runtime files. Reinstall with the latest installer and try again.
status.loginRequiredBody: The bundled CLI is already available, but this computer has not completed Dreamina authorization yet. Automatic setup will show the official Dreamina login QR code directly in this dialog and wait for the scan to finish.
status.membershipRequiredTitle: This account cannot use Dreamina CLI yet
status.membershipRequiredBody: The account you just scanned is not an eligible Dreamina premium member, so Dreamina CLI cannot save the login session for it yet.
status.unknownBody: Automatic setup already covers the common path, but this machine still needs manual attention based on the detail below.

progress.idleBody: When this dialog opens, the app will prepare the Git runtime, check the bundled Dreamina CLI, and show the login QR code directly when authorization is needed.
progress.checkingBody: Confirming the Git runtime, CLI availability, and login state.
progress.preparingBundledGitTitle: Preparing the bundled Git Bash runtime
progress.preparingBundledGitBody: The app will prefer the portable Git runtime that ships with the installer.
progress.preparingSystemGitTitle: Using the existing system Git Bash
progress.preparingSystemGitBody: A bundled runtime was not found, so the app is automatically falling back to the Git Bash that is already installed on this machine.
progress.installingCliBody: The app will prefer the Dreamina CLI that ships inside the installer, so a separate online install is normally no longer needed.
progress.openingLoginBody: The app is using Dreamina's official headless login flow to render the QR code.
progress.waitingForLoginTitle: Scan the QR code with Douyin
progress.waitingForLoginBody: The QR code will appear directly in this dialog. After you scan it and confirm on your phone, the app will finish automatically.
progress.failedBody: This automatic attempt did not produce a usable QR code. Please refresh the QR code or check the Dreamina runtime detail below.
progress.verifyingBody: Confirming that the bundled CLI is available and the account is now logged in.
progress.completedBody: You can go back to the canvas and continue generating or re-querying now.

qr.compactHint: You only need to scan once on first use. After login succeeds, the app continues automatically.
qr.title: Scan with Douyin to log in
qr.body: Just scan with Douyin. After you confirm on the phone, the app continues automatically.
qr.waitingBody: The first-use login flow starts automatically. The QR code will appear here as soon as Dreamina finishes rendering it.
qr.failedTitle: The QR code did not render this time
qr.failedBody: A scannable QR code is still not available. Click Refresh QR Code and keep this dialog open while the app retries.
qr.step2: Confirm on phone, then return automatically
qr.step3: 3. Keep this dialog open and the app will return automatically after login succeeds

manualLogin.title: Dreamina switched to browser login
manualLogin.body: Dreamina CLI could not auto-open a browser inside this runtime, so it has fallen back to manual web authorization. Open the login page below, finish the authorization in the browser, and keep this dialog open while the app continues automatically.

membershipRequired.title: The scanned account is not a Dreamina premium member
membershipRequired.body: Dreamina CLI currently needs a premium Dreamina membership before it can save the login session. Upgrade the account on the Dreamina web site, or switch to an account that already has premium enabled, then scan again.

automatic.title: Automatically handled
automatic.git: Prefer the bundled portable Git runtime when it is available
automatic.cli: Prefer the Dreamina CLI bundled inside the installer
automatic.login: Generate the official QR code and recheck after the scan

runtime.bundled: Currently using the bundled portable Git runtime.
runtime.system: Currently using the existing system Git Bash as a fallback runtime.

detailSummary.loginSessionMissing: This computer still does not have a usable Dreamina login session.
detailSummary.qrNotReturned: Dreamina did not return a usable login QR code this time.
detailSummary.callbackPortBusy: The local login callback port is still busy. Close old login processes and retry.
detailSummary.membershipRequired: The scanned account is not a Dreamina premium member yet, so the CLI cannot save the login session.
detailSummary.recheckPending: Dreamina is still waiting for the local login session to pass recheck.
detailSummary.fallback: The environment is still not fully ready. Refresh the QR code or run another recheck.

notice.autoReady: Automatic setup is complete. Dreamina CLI is ready to use now.
notice.autoClosing: This computer is ready now. Returning to the canvas...
notice.loginOpened: The QR code is ready. Scan it directly with Douyin.
notice.loginStillPending: The current QR code can still be scanned. If you already confirmed on the phone, click Recheck. If the QR code expired, click Refresh QR Code.
notice.membershipRequired: The scanned account is not a Dreamina premium member yet, so Dreamina CLI could not save the login session. Upgrade the account or switch to a premium account, then scan again.
notice.autoNeedsAttention: Automatic setup ran, but the environment is still not fully ready. Please continue based on the detail below.

blocked.gitBashMissing: A usable Git Bash runtime is still missing on this computer. Finish the Dreamina setup first.
blocked.cliMissing: The bundled Dreamina CLI is missing on this computer. Install the latest OOpii Infinite Canvas build first.
blocked.loginRequired: Dreamina CLI is not logged in yet. Finish the Dreamina setup first.
blocked.membershipRequired: The scanned account is not a Dreamina premium member yet. Upgrade the account or switch accounts, then try again.
blocked.unknown: Dreamina is not fully ready yet. Please finish the setup and login first.

panel.title: Jimeng Video Queue
panel.loading: Restoring queued jobs for this project...
panel.empty: There are no queued tasks in this project yet.

schedule.immediateDescription: The task enters the queue immediately and sends when a slot is free.
schedule.scheduledDescription: The task waits until the selected time before submitting.
schedule.timeHint: The app will submit the task at this time while it is running. If the app is sleeping or closed, the task will be sent after it resumes.
schedule.timeInvalid: Choose a send time later than now.
schedule.immediateHint: The task will enter the queue as soon as possible and still respect the 10-task concurrency cap.

result.waiting: This task is queued and waiting to be sent.
result.waitingUntil: This task is queued and will be sent automatically at {{time}}.
result.waitingConcurrency: The scheduled time has arrived and the task is waiting for a free concurrency slot.
result.submitting: Preparing assets and submitting the Jimeng task.
result.submitted: The task has been submitted and is waiting for Dreamina to start generating.
result.failed: The task failed and automatic retries have stopped ({{current}}/{{max}}).
result.failedWithReason: The task failed and automatic retries have stopped ({{current}}/{{max}}): {{reason}}

errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit the Jimeng video task
errors.timeout: Jimeng video generation timed out and is ready to retry.
errors.resultEmpty: Jimeng did not return any usable video result.
errors.sourceNodeMissing: The source Jimeng node no longer exists, so the queued task was cancelled.

update.dialogDescription: A new version is available. Do you want to download it now?
update.ignoreTodayVersion: Do not remind this version today

script.importChapterCountDesc: Please enter the number of chapters, empty chapter nodes will be created accordingly
script.expandFromSummaryDesc: Generate complete script content based on chapter summary

sceneStudio.title: Scene Studio
sceneStudio.subtitle: Write the story scene by scene with clearer dramatic intent.
sceneStudio.panelResize: Drag to resize the Scene Studio panel
sceneStudio.emptyHint: Open Scene Studio from the plot tree or a chapter card to keep writing focused on the current scene.
sceneStudio.sceneCardHint: Add the purpose, conflict, or visual hook for this scene.
sceneStudio.chapterFocusSubtitle: Lock what this chapter must accomplish before zooming into the current scene.
sceneStudio.sceneBlueprintSubtitle: Capture the dramatic job, pressure, and turn of this scene before polishing lines.
sceneStudio.chapterSummaryPlaceholder: What does this chapter accomplish for the larger story?
sceneStudio.chapterPurposePlaceholder: Example: deepen conflict, reveal relationship, trigger reversal
sceneStudio.chapterQuestionPlaceholder: What should the audience want answered at the end of this chapter?
sceneStudio.sceneTitlePlaceholder: Give this scene a short title
sceneStudio.povCharacterPlaceholder: Who leads the audience through this scene?
sceneStudio.scenePurposePlaceholder: What job does this scene do for the larger story?
sceneStudio.emotionalShiftPlaceholder: What emotional state does the character move from and to?
sceneStudio.goalPlaceholder: Who wants what in this scene
sceneStudio.turnPlaceholder: What changes by the end of the scene
sceneStudio.visualHookPlaceholder: A memorable visual action or beat the camera can capture
sceneStudio.subtextPlaceholder: What the characters mean or hide beneath the spoken lines
sceneStudio.directorNotesSubtitle: Keep the scene's lensing, blocking, rhythm, and performance intent in one place.
sceneStudio.directorNotesHint: Use this page to hold directing intent only, so writing and directing do not compete for space.
sceneStudio.directorNotesPlaceholder: Blocking, rhythm, camera, or performance notes
sceneStudio.continuitySubtitle: Keep a compact memory card for this scene so later drafting does not contradict established story facts.
sceneStudio.continuityHint: Copilot will treat these notes as continuity guardrails when analyzing, continuing, or rewriting this scene.
sceneStudio.continuitySummaryPlaceholder: What should future scenes remember about this scene in one compact paragraph?
sceneStudio.continuityFactsPlaceholder: One fact per line. Example: Lin now knows the tape is real.
sceneStudio.continuityOpenLoopsPlaceholder: One unresolved thread per line. Example: Who sent the anonymous photo?
sceneStudio.continuityNotGenerated: Memory has not been generated yet. You can write it manually or let Copilot extract it.
sceneStudio.continuityRefreshError: Failed to refresh the continuity memory. Please try again.
sceneStudio.continuityCheckNoIssues: No specific issues were listed, but this draft may still need a manual continuity pass.
sceneStudio.draftSubtitle: Write the full action and dialogue here. Highlight a passage to trigger precise rewrite tools.
sceneStudio.draftPlaceholder: Write the action, dialogue, and emotional progression for this scene.
sceneStudio.copilotSubtitle: Ask for scene analysis, continuation, or a more director-minded pass while you write.
sceneStudio.copilotEmpty: Ask what is weak in the conflict, request the next beat, or get a director pass for this scene.
sceneStudio.copilotClearHint: Clear the current scene Copilot output without affecting content already applied to the draft or director notes.
sceneStudio.copilotInputPlaceholder: Example: Does this scene turn strongly enough? Or give me a tighter continuation with more subtext.
sceneStudio.copilotUnknownError: Copilot request failed. Please try again.
sceneStudio.selectionEmpty: Select a paragraph or dialogue beat in the draft to run a precise rewrite.
sceneStudio.selectionActionTightenPrompt: Rewrite this passage to be tighter, cleaner, and more dramatically efficient.
sceneStudio.selectionActionSubtextPrompt: Rewrite this passage with stronger subtext and less on-the-nose wording.
sceneStudio.selectionActionDialoguePrompt: Rewrite this passage so the dialogue feels more natural, character-specific, and playable.
sceneStudio.selectionInputPlaceholder: Add a custom rewrite instruction for the selected text.
sceneStudio.selectionVariantsHint: Compare the rhythm and intent, then choose the version you want to keep.
sceneStudio.selectionNeedTarget: If this is an older rewrite set, reselect the matching passage in the draft before applying it.
sceneStudio.importOriginalHint: This scene still keeps the imported source text. Compare your revisions or restore the original wording whenever needed.
sceneStudio.importOriginalRestored: Restored this scene draft to the imported original. You can still undo from history if needed.

storyStart.title: Story Launch Pad
storyStart.subtitle: Choose how you want to begin shaping the script.
storyStart.createSubtitle: Give the story premise and let AI turn it into chapters and scenes.
storyStart.createCardDesc: Answer a few high-value story questions and get a chapter-and-scene structure with some director thinking built in.
storyStart.importCardDesc: Bring in a finished draft and preserve as much of the original writing as possible before refining it scene by scene.
storyStart.importDesc: We will create empty chapter nodes for you, and each chapter will already be ready to hold scenes in Scene Studio.
storyStart.importFileDesc: Supports TXT, Markdown, Fountain, FDX, and DOCX. The default goal is preservation first, not collapsing your draft into a skeleton.
storyStart.importPreviewEmptyDesc: We will parse the draft, preview the detected chapters and scenes, and only then import it into the workspace.
storyStart.importParseError: Import parsing failed. Please try a different file.
storyStart.importWarningSingleChapter: No reliable chapter structure was found, so the draft will be preserved inside a single chapter first.
storyStart.importWarningSingleScene: No reliable scene headings were found, so the body text will be preserved without forcing a scene split.
storyStart.importWarningSceneHeuristic: Scene splitting was inferred heuristically. Please review the imported scene boundaries afterward.
storyStart.importWarningDocxFormatting: DOCX import prioritizes text and paragraph preservation. Some Word-specific styling may not carry over exactly.
storyStart.importWarningFdxNoSceneHeading: No standard scene headings were detected in this FDX, so the draft will be preserved more conservatively.
storyStart.providerMissing: Configure a script model first if you want AI to build the initial story skeleton.
storyStart.premisePlaceholder: Example: A washed-up stuntman gets one last chance to protect his daughter during a live TV disaster.
storyStart.protagonistPlaceholder: Who is at the center of this story?
storyStart.wantPlaceholder: What does the protagonist desperately want?
storyStart.stakesPlaceholder: What will be lost if the protagonist fails?
storyStart.themePlaceholder: What human question or contradiction is this story really about?
storyStart.tonePlaceholder: Dry, tense, lyrical, cruelly funny, warm...
storyStart.directorVisionPlaceholder: What should the audience feel or see most strongly? Mention staging, rhythm, or visual style.
storyStart.worldviewPlaceholder: Any worldbuilding, era, social rules, or environment details worth locking in early?
storyStart.previewEmptyTitle: A stronger start than a blank page
storyStart.previewEmptyDesc: Generate a story skeleton first, then keep writing inside Scene Studio scene by scene.
